description: 6nz-F4: a reactive ${@x} inside a <textarea> (RCDATA content model) binds the element's .value reactively instead of leaking a <span data-scrml-logic> placeholder as literal text. Clicking #go runs change() (@x: hello -> world); the textarea's live .value tracks the cell.
rationale: §24.3.1 companion (SPEC.md:1141): <textarea> has an RCDATA content model — its body is raw text, so scrml's reactive interp placeholder span is invalid inside it (it renders verbatim). The fix binds the interp to .value (the one-way read-side of bind:value, §5.4). notCodes guards the sibling ruling: with NO bind:value present, the conflict lint must NOT fire.
